title: citrus medica f. limon
intro: Citrus medica f. limon, also known as the lemon plant, is a variety of the citron tree that has been cultivated for its sour and aromatic fruit. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of consuming lemon plant products include boosting the immune system, improving digestion, and reducing stress levels, while its essential oil can be used to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Citrus medica f. limon include teas, infusions, and juices, which can be consumed raw or used in cooking and skincare products, such as soaps, creams, and lotions.
